content:
VUT Blackboard Login — Vaal University of Technology

The Vaal University of Technology (VUT) Blackboard portal is the official online learning platform for all VUT students. This guide shows you how to access your Blackboard VUT account, troubleshoot common login issues, and find bursary assistance for the 2026 academic year.

VUT Blackboard Direct Login

🔗 Go to VUT Blackboard Login → blackboard.vut.ac.za

You will need:
- Your VUT student number (issued at registration)
- Your Blackboard password (default is your ID number for first-time users)

How to Login to Blackboard VUT — Step-by-Step

  1. Open your browser — Use Google Chrome or Mozilla Firefox for best compatibility with Blackboard VUT.
  2. Go to blackboard.vut.ac.za — This is the official VUT Blackboard login page.
  3. Enter your student number — Type your full VUT student number in the Username field.
  4. Enter your password — First-time VUT students use their ID number as the default password. If you've changed it, use your current password.
  5. Click Sign In — You'll be redirected to your Blackboard VUT dashboard showing all your enrolled modules.

VUT Blackboard Login Problems — Troubleshooting Guide

Forgotten VUT Blackboard Password

On the VUT Blackboard login page, click "Forgot Password". A password reset link will be sent to your official VUT email address (@students.vut.ac.za). Alternatively, visit the VUT ICT Helpdesk on campus with your student card.

📞 VUT ICT Support: +27 16 950 9000

VUT Student Number Not Recognised

If your VUT student number is not recognised on Blackboard, check that:

  • Your registration at VUT has been completed and processed (allow 24–48 hours)
  • You are typing your student number exactly as it appears on your student card
  • You are not confusing your student number with your ID number

Modules Not Showing on Blackboard VUT

Modules appear on your Blackboard VUT account 24–48 hours after the lecturer enrols the class. If your modules are still missing, contact your faculty administrator at VUT.

Browser or Technical Issues

Clear your browser cache (Ctrl+Shift+Delete on PC) and disable any browser extensions that may interfere with Blackboard. VUT Blackboard does not fully support Internet Explorer — use Chrome or Firefox instead.

VUT Blackboard on Mobile

VUT students can also access Blackboard on mobile devices by downloading the Blackboard Student app from the Google Play Store (Android) or Apple App Store (iOS). Log in with your VUT student number and password.

Struggling with More Than Just a Login? 2026 Bursary Assistance for VUT Students

Accessing Blackboard is just one part of your journey at VUT. Staying enrolled requires funding — and many VUT students face financial exclusion even when they are academically capable.

StudyBuddy provides bursary assistance to help VUT students find and apply for funding:

  • 💰 NSFAS application support — Navigate appeals, reapplications, and funding queries
  • 🏗️ Engineering & Technology bursaries — VUT's engineering and IT programmes qualify for numerous corporate bursaries from Eskom, Sasol, Anglo American, and more
  • 🎓 2026 bursary cycle deadlines — Many bursaries close in April–June 2026; apply now
  • 📋 Application preparation — We help you write a strong motivation letter and gather the correct documents

👉 Find 2026 bursaries for VUT students →

👉 Get CAPS-aligned academic support from StudyBuddy →

⚠️ Disclaimer: StudyBuddy is an independent student support platform. We are not officially affiliated with the Vaal University of Technology (VUT) or Blackboard Inc. All VUT trademarks belong to their respective owners. Your data is protected under POPIA.

faqs.question: What is the VUT Blackboard login URL?
faqs.answer: The VUT Blackboard login URL is blackboard.vut.ac.za. Go to this address in your browser, enter your VUT student number and password, and click Sign In.

faqs.question: What is the default password for VUT Blackboard?
faqs.answer: For first-time VUT Blackboard users, the default password is typically your South African ID number. After your first login, you should change this to a secure personal password.

faqs.question: How do I reset my VUT Blackboard password?
faqs.answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the VUT Blackboard login page and a reset link will be sent to your official VUT student email. If you can't access your student email, visit the VUT ICT Helpdesk on campus with your student card or call +27 16 950 9000.

faqs.question: Are there bursaries available for VUT students in 2026?
faqs.answer: Yes — VUT students can apply for NSFAS, corporate bursaries (especially in engineering, IT, and technology), and sector-specific funding. StudyBuddy helps VUT students identify and apply for bursaries before the 2026 deadlines.

faqs.question: Can I access VUT Blackboard on my phone?
faqs.answer: Yes. Download the Blackboard Student app from the Google Play Store or Apple App Store. Log in with your VUT student number and Blackboard password.
